Mathematics Minor

AMSC courses except MATH478, MATH480-MATH484, MATH489, MATH498, and STAT464 are acceptable.

Other issues related to the minor in Mathematics:

The minor in Mathematics is NOT open to Mathematics majors.

The student will need to achieve at least a "C-" (1.7) in each minor
